ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Matthew J. Perotti, Esq. for Shirley Gray, David Wong, Nancy Young, and Sammy J. Wong, Petitioners;
Shirley Gray, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that this matter was on for probate of the will and that it left this matter on calendar today to see if anyone would appear to object. The Court inquired if anyone was appearing via Zoom, in person, or by CourtCall to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 8/9/2005 is admitted to probate. David Wong is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for November 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Continued To Oct-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
